audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:clause + toch + clause]] and [[grammar:elf tot en met twintig]]. Use [[grammar:toch]] when something happens despite the situation. Learn the number words from eleven to twenty and use them in scores and counts.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:clause + toch + clause]]: [[grammar:Toch]] functions as a concessive connective adverb and may occupy the middle field or first position.; [[grammar:elf tot en met twintig]]: The teen numerals are lexicalized forms; [[grammar:twintig]] establishes the next decade base.

audienceSections.normal:
#### clause + toch + clause

Use [[grammar:toch]] when something happens despite the situation. Example: [[grammar:Het regent, maar de wedstrijd gaat toch door.]]

#### elf tot en met twintig

Learn the number words from eleven to twenty and use them in scores and counts. Example: [[grammar:Milan heeft nu twintig punten.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### clause + toch + clause

[[grammar:Toch]] functions as a concessive connective adverb and may occupy the middle field or first position. Literal example: [[grammar:Het regent, maar de wedstrijd gaat toch door.]]

#### elf tot en met twintig

The teen numerals are lexicalized forms; [[grammar:twintig]] establishes the next decade base. Literal example: [[grammar:Milan heeft nu twintig punten.]]

audienceSections.normal: [[grammar:Toch]] marks an outcome that is surprising or contrary to expectation. Eleven through twenty are learned as their own number forms.
audienceSections.expert: [[grammar:Toch]] marks an outcome that is surprising or contrary to expectation. Eleven through twenty are learned as their own number forms.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Het regent, maar de wedstrijd gaat toch door.]] — It is raining, but the competition continues anyway.
- [[grammar:De eerste groep heeft elf punten.]] — The first group has eleven points.
- [[grammar:De tweede groep heeft twaalf punten.]] — The second group has twelve points.
- [[grammar:Wij hebben dertien punten na het lopen.]] — We have thirteen points after the running event.
- [[grammar:De volgende teams hebben veertien en vijftien punten.]] — The next teams have fourteen and fifteen points.
- [[grammar:Milan krijgt zestien punten voor het fietsen.]] — Milan gets sixteen points for cycling.
- [[grammar:Sophie heeft zeventien punten bij het springen.]] — Sophie has seventeen points in the jumping event.
- [[grammar:Alex telt achttien deelnemers op het veld.]] — Alex counts eighteen participants on the field.
- [[grammar:Negentien leerlingen komen toch nog over de finish.]] — Nineteen pupils still cross the finish line after all.
- [[grammar:Milan heeft nu twintig punten.]] — Sophie now has twenty points.
- [[grammar:Dat is het hoogste aantal van vandaag.]] — That is the highest total today.
- [[grammar:Mooi, maar we helpen toch eerst de andere groep.]] — Great, but we will still help the other group first.
breakdown.expert:
